function[T0: Ring](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: Nat) { (-x0).coeff(x1) = -x0.coeff(x1) }[R](p, w0)
function[T0: lib(neg).Neg, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1) { -x0(x1) = pointwise_neg[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[R, Nat](p.coeff, w0)
function[T0: Ring](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: Polynomial[T0]) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[R](p, q)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0) { x0 + -x0 = T0.0 }[R](p.coeff(n))
exists(k0: Nat) { Polynomial.zero[R].coeff(k0) != (p + -p).coeff(k0) }
let w0: Nat satisfy { (p + -p).coeff(w0) != Polynomial.zero[R].coeff(w0) }
function[T0: Ring](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: Polynomial[T0]) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[R](p, p)
